userStories.title: Diagnose social media posting failures
userStories.description: Investigate why 10 social media posts failed to post on schedule and why the system keeps showing posts as 'overdue'.
acceptanceCriteria: Read social-media-automation/output/scheduled_posts.json
Read social-media-automation/output/posting_log.json
Identify the root cause of failed posts
Document error patterns in SOCIAL-MEDIA-DIAGNOSIS.md

userStories.title: Analyze X/Twitter rate limiting
userStories.description: The system hit rate limits when posting to X. Understand the rate limits and how to handle them.
acceptanceCriteria: Research X API v2 rate limits for posting
Document current posting frequency vs limits
Calculate safe posting intervals
Create RATE-LIMIT-ANALYSIS.md

userStories.title: Fix duplicate content detection
userStories.description: Posts are failing with 'duplicate content' errors. Need to implement content variation or deduplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify which posts failed due to duplicate content
Review social_media_poster.py for content handling
Implement content uniqueness check before posting
Add timestamp or variation to prevent duplicates

userStories.title: Implement rate-limit-aware posting
userStories.description: Update the posting system to respect rate limits and queue posts appropriately.
acceptanceCriteria: Update social_media_poster.py with rate limit handling
Add exponential backoff on rate limit errors
Implement post queue with 120+ second spacing
Log rate limit encounters for monitoring

userStories.title: Add retry mechanism for failed posts
userStories.description: Create a system to automatically retry failed posts with proper error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'retry_count' field to scheduled_posts.json
Implement retry logic (max 3 attempts)
Add different handling for different error types
Mark permanently failed posts after max retries
userStories.notes: Added ErrorType enum (retryable/permanent/unknown), _classify_error() method, error_type and last_retry_at fields, archive-old and retry CLI commands

userStories.title: Create social media status dashboard
userStories.description: Build a status report showing pending, posted, failed, and retrying posts.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/social_media_status.py
Show summary: total, pending, posted, failed, overdue
Show recent errors with timestamps
Add CLI command: python -m src.social_media_status
userStories.notes: Created social_media_status.py with health score, error list, overdue list, posting stats. CLI supports --format json, --errors, --overdue, --stats

userStories.title: Clear overdue posts backlog
userStories.description: Process or archive the current overdue posts to reset the system to a healthy state.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify all currently overdue posts
Attempt to post any that are still relevant
Archive posts that are too old to post
Update scheduled_posts.json to clean state
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT COMPLETED 2026-01-24: Archived 4 duplicate content posts. Reset 6 rate-limited posts for retry. System health 80->88.

metadata.objective: Debug and fix social media automation issues: rate limiting, duplicate content errors, and overdue post handling
